prompts: A tiny chibi elderly Sardinian man with a weathered face, warm smile, and traditional dark vest stands on a sunlit hilltop village terrace at dawn, arms open wide toward a golden horizon. The rising sun casts long amber rays across ancient stone houses behind him. A lone olive tree frames the left edge of the scene. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, dusty terracotta, slate blue. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the sunrise horizon. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A wide establishing shot of a charming Sardinian hilltop village at sunrise — cobblestone piazza, terracotta rooftops, laundry hanging between windows. Three tiny chibi elderly villagers walk slowly through the golden morning light, eyes turned toward the rising sun, steaming espresso cups in hand. Swallows circle overhead. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: golden ochre, dusty rose, warm grey. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the figures and rooftops. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi young adult with heavy eyelids and disheveled hair sits slumped at a kitchen table, phone in hand at 2pm, half-empty coffee mug in front of them, curtains drawn blocking the sunlight outside. A small clock on the wall shows 14:00. The room is dim, desaturated, slightly chaotic with scattered papers. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: cool grey, murky blue, pale yellow. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. No warm glow — flat, lifeless interior light. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. A detailed anatomical-meets-storybook illustration: a glowing chibi brain cross-section shows the hypothalamus lit up like a lantern inside, with tiny golden light rays streaming in through illustrated eyes. Surrounding the brain: small symbolic icons of a sun, a hormone molecule, a clock face, and a heart — all connected by delicate ink-line paths. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi proportions for the eye and brain elements. Muted desaturated color palette: deep teal, warm gold, parchment cream. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the hypothalamus lantern core. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. No text, no speech bubbles, no typography, no UI elements.

A chibi figure stands barefoot on a sunlit apartment balcony in an Italian city, holding a tiny espresso cup, face lifted toward the morning sky with a serene smile. The balcony is lined with terracotta pots of herbs and flowers. Below, a narrow cobblestone street with a fountain is visible. No sunglasses. The sun is low and golden, rays catching the figure's face directly. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm amber, sage green, soft cream. Cross-hatching and stippling shading. Old parchment paper texture overlay. Soft warm amber glow on the character's face and espresso cup. Detailed foreground, softer background. Decorative panel border frame. Vertical 9:16 format, safe zone padding top 15% and bottom 25%. A cheerful chibi character stands in a sunny Italian piazza surrounded by blooming flowers, energetically waving both arms toward the viewer with a wide joyful smile. Behind them: a beautiful baroque fountain, golden morning light on ancient stone facades, a cat sitting nearby. The overall scene radiates warmth and vitality. Style: Traditional hand-drawn European comic illustration. Chibi character proportions with large expressive heads. Muted desaturated color palette: warm gold, dusty terracotta, sky blue.
